questions: Where is the login page and what does it currently render?
Does a PX logo asset already exist in the repository?
What is the best placement approach for the logo (page-level, layout-level, or Clerk appearance API)?
What is the existing pattern for rendering logos in this codebase?
What does 'PX' refer to and what logo format is appropriate?

answers.answer: The login page is at src/app/[locale]/(auth)/(center)/sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx. It renders only the Clerk <SignIn> component with no surrounding content, wrapped by a center layout that provides min-h-screen flex centering.

No PX logo asset exists anywhere in the repository. The public/assets/images/ directory contains only sponsor/third-party logos (clerk, sentry, arcjet, crowdin, etc.) and boilerplate screenshots. No file matching 'px', 'project-x', or similar exists.
evidence: ls public/assets/images/ shows 18 files, none PX-related
Grep for '(?i)(project.?x|px.?logo|px.?brand)' found matches only in .helix ticket/scout artifacts, not in source code

answers.answer: The simplest and most appropriate approach is to add the logo above the Clerk <SignIn> component in the sign-in page component. This scopes the change to the login page as the ticket requests. The center layout approach would also affect sign-up (not requested). The Clerk appearance API could set logoImageUrl but would require configuring Clerk's internal branding system, which is more complex than needed.
evidence: Ticket says 'PX Logo on login page' - singular, scoped to login
src/app/[locale]/(auth)/layout.tsx ClerkProvider appearance only has cssLayerName currently

answers.answer: The codebase uses next/image with static imports from @/public/assets/images/ for logo rendering. The Sponsors.tsx component demonstrates this pattern with width props and alt text.
evidence: src/components/Sponsors.tsx lines 2-10: static imports like `import clerkLogo from '@/public/assets/images/clerk-logo-dark.png'`

answers.answer: 'PX' most likely refers to 'Project X' based on the GitHub organization name 'Project-X-Innovation'. Since no logo asset exists, one must be created. An SVG is the best format for a text-based logo (scalable, small file size, matches existing SVG assets in the project). A simple text-based SVG with 'PX' branding is appropriate as a placeholder that can be replaced with a proper brand asset later.
evidence: public/assets/images/ already contains SVG files (arcjet-dark.svg, arcjet-light.svg, coderabbit-logo-*.svg, posthog-logo.svg)

statement: The login page currently renders only the Clerk <SignIn> component with no custom branding. The ticket requests adding a PX (Project X) logo to this page. No PX logo asset exists in the repository. The fix requires: (1) creating an SVG logo asset in public/assets/images/, and (2) modifying the sign-in page component to render the logo above the Clerk sign-in form using the established next/image pattern. The change is scoped to the sign-in page only, as the ticket specifically says 'login page'.
